title: Cobbled Trainers
description: Makes use of Cobblemon's built-in trainer system to make an enjoyable Cobblemon progression.
body:
It is no secret that Cobblemon can get boring at times without any actual challenges, but this addon aims to make a progression-based trainer experience, while using Cobblemon's built in trainer system.

This addon (when finished) will add 8 Gym Leaders, 4 Elite Four Members, a Champion, and most likely more! (Red Gyarados structure with 300 scientists and guards that have lvl 90+ Pokémon and engage on-sight?) 

![Pack Icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3ae900d03aa58699987827343fdbf152108f8797.png)

***This addon has to be downloaded as both a Data Pack and a Resource Pack***

Credits to [BaLLducked](https://modrinth.com/user/BaLLducked) for some trainer skins.

The addon is still early in development, but I will post a beta update every now and then.
